member.summary: Number of password hash iterations. Office's modern default is 100,000.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Shared.OfficeEncryptionOptions.KeyBits

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Shared.OfficeEncryptionOptions.HashAlgorithm

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.CoerceValueHelper.Coerce(System.Object,System.Func{System.String,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValue},System.Func{System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTime},OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDateSystem)
member.summary: Converts an arbitrary CLR value into the and tuple used by Excel.
member.param: The value to be represented in a worksheet cell.
Delegate that materialises a entry for shared strings.

Optional delegate used to convert instances into values before calculating the Excel serial number. When omitted, is used. The provided strategy only influences the numeric serial value that is written; cell formatting must still be applied separately.
Workbook date system used when serializing and values.
member.returns: The OpenXML representation of the supplied value.
member.remarks: Integer values with an absolute magnitude above ±9,007,199,254,740,992 are written using their string form to prevent double precision loss while keeping the cell typed as .
member.exception: Thrown when the resulting shared-string payload exceeds Excel's 32,767 character limit.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationCleanupPolicy
member.summary: Controls how workbook calculation metadata is handled when stale calculation chains are removed.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationCleanupPolicy.PreserveExistingCalculationProperties
member.summary: Removes stale calculation-chain parts while preserving existing workbook calculation properties.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationCleanupPolicy.ClearAutomaticFullCalculationOnOpen
member.summary: Removes stale calculation-chain parts and clears automatic full-recalculation flags from existing workbook calculation properties.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationCleanupPolicy.RequestFullCalculationOnOpen
member.summary: Removes stale calculation-chain parts and explicitly requests full recalculation when the workbook is opened.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationOptions
member.summary: Controls how formula cells are treated before a workbook is saved.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationOptions.EvaluateFormulasBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, OfficeIMO evaluates supported formulas and writes cached values before saving. Unsupported formulas are left intact and can still be recalculated by Excel.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationOptions.MarkFormulasDirtyBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, formula cells are marked dirty so Excel-compatible applications recalculate them on open.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationOptions.ForceFullCalculationOnOpen
member.summary: When true, workbook calculation properties request a full recalculation when the file opens.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelCalculationOptions.ClearCachedFormulaResultsBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, cached formula results are removed before saving. Ignored when is true.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookProtectionOptions
member.summary: Options used when protecting the workbook structure.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookProtectionOptions.ProtectStructure
member.summary: Protects the workbook structure, which prevents sheet add/delete/move/rename operations in Excel UI.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookProtectionOptions.ProtectWindows
member.summary: Protects workbook windows where supported by the consuming application.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookProtectionOptions.Password
member.summary: Optional workbook protection password. This is Excel UI protection, not package encryption.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookProtectionOptions.LegacyPasswordHash
member.summary: Optional precomputed legacy workbook protection hash. When set, this value is written as-is.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument
member.summary: Represents an Excel document and provides methods for creating, loading and saving spreadsheets.
Indexer helpers for convenient sheet access (name or 0-based index).
Convenience bridge methods exposing read helpers on an open ExcelDocument to avoid re-opening files.
Simple workbook template helpers for replacing {{Marker}} placeholders in text cells.
Represents an Excel document and provides methods for creating, loading and saving spreadsheets.
Represents an Excel document and provides methods for creating, loading and saving spreadsheets.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument.SheetCachingEnabled
member.summary: Enables caching of wrappers for faster repeat access at the cost of higher memory usage. Set to to avoid holding references to every sheet in very large workbooks.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument.TableNameComparer
member.summary: Controls how workbook-level table name uniqueness is compared. Defaults to . Changing this will reset the internal cache and rebuild it on next use. Set it once before adding tables for predictable behavior.

member.summary: Optional default chart style preset applied to charts created in this workbook.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument.DateTimeOffsetWriteStrategy
member.summary: Controls how values are converted to before being written to worksheet cells. Defaults to .
member.remarks: The delegate influences the numeric serial value stored in the cell but does not automatically change number formats. Apply the desired cell formatting separately.

A1 range (e.g. "A1:B10"). Can include a sheet prefix.
Optional sheet scope for a local name.
When true, saves the workbook after the change.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument.NormalizeRange(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes an A1-style range, ensuring absolute references and validating format. Accepts an optional sheet prefix (e.g. ''Sheet1'!A1:B2'). Throws if the input is not a valid A1 range or cell reference.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument.EnsureValidDefinedName(System.String,OfficeIMO.Excel.NameValidationMode)
member.summary: Ensures a defined name complies with Excel rules. In Sanitize mode, returns a corrected name. Throws in Strict mode when input is invalid. Rules: - 1..255 characters - First char must be a letter or underscore - Allowed characters: letters, digits, underscore, period - Cannot look like a cell reference (e.g., A1, AA10) or an R1C1 reference - Cannot be TRUE or FALSE (case-insensitive)

member.summary: Gets or sets whether response Content-Type should be validated when present.

member.summary: Gets the accepted media types used when is enabled.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelHttpLoadOptions.Progress
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional progress sink invoked as response bytes are copied.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes
member.summary: Stable diagnostic codes emitted by Excel image export.
member.remarks: These values are part of the image-export contract so callers can filter or assert known unsupported and approximate rendering cases without copying string literals.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellTextClipped
member.summary: Cell text was clipped or ellipsized to fit rendered bounds.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellTextOccludedByDrawing
member.summary: Cell text was suppressed because a later drawing layer covers the text anchor.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellTextRotationApproximation
member.summary: Cell text rotation was rendered through an approximate path.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellStackedTextRotationUnsupported
member.summary: Stacked vertical cell text is not rendered exactly yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellTextRotationUnsupported
member.summary: The cell requested a text rotation value outside the supported range.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellRichTextLayoutApproximation
member.summary: Rich text fell back to an approximate or plain-text layout path.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellFontFamilyFallback
member.summary: Requested cell font family could not be loaded exactly by the dependency-free exporter.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.FillGradientUnsupported
member.summary: Excel gradient fills are not rendered by the dependency-free exporter yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.FillPatternApproximation
member.summary: Excel pattern fills are rendered as deterministic hatch approximations.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalRuleUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting rule type.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalIconSetUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting icon set.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalIconSetApproximation
member.summary: Conditional formatting icon sets are rendered as deterministic dependency-free approximations.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalColorScaleUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting color scale variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalDataBarUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting data bar variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalCellIsUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting cell-is expression.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalFormulaUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting formula expression.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalTopBottomUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting top/bottom variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalAboveAverageUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting above/below-average variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalTextRuleUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting text-rule variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalTimePeriodUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting time-period variant.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ConditionalDifferentialFormatUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported conditional formatting differential-format feature.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImageRasterFormatUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported raster image format for PNG export.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImageSvgFormatUnsupported
member.summary: Unsupported image format for SVG embedding.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImagePngDecodeUnavailable
member.summary: PNG image bytes could not be decoded by the dependency-free exporter.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImageBytesMissing
member.summary: Worksheet image bytes could not be read.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImageFormatUnknown
member.summary: Worksheet image bytes did not contain a recognized image header.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ImageAnchorHidden
member.summary: Worksheet image was omitted because its anchor row or column is hidden.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAnchorHidden
member.summary: Worksheet chart was omitted because its anchor row or column is hidden.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.DrawingShapeAnchorHidden
member.summary: Worksheet drawing shape was omitted because its anchor row or column is hidden.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.HiddenRowsOmitted
member.summary: Hidden rows were omitted from the exported visual range.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.HiddenColumnsOmitted
member.summary: Hidden columns were omitted from the exported visual range.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellCommentUnsupported
member.summary: Classic comment or note bodies are not rendered yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.CellCommentBodyApproximation
member.summary: Classic comment or note bodies are rendered as dependency-free callout approximations.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ThreadedCommentUnsupported
member.summary: Threaded comment bodies are not rendered yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ThreadedCommentBodyApproximation
member.summary: Threaded comment bodies are rendered as dependency-free callout approximations.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.DrawingShapeUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet drawing shape is not renderable by the current image exporter.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.DrawingShapeTextRotationApproximation
member.summary: Worksheet drawing shape text is rendered through an approximate rotation path.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.DrawingShapeTextAutoFitUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet drawing shape text requested resizing the shape to fit text, which image export does not support yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.DrawingShapeTextVerticalOrientationUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet drawing shape text requested a non-horizontal orientation, which image export does not support yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartSnapshotUnavailable
member.summary: Worksheet chart could not be converted to a renderable snapshot.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartKindApproximated
member.summary: Chart kind is rendered through an approximate chart snapshot.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartKindUnsupported
member.summary: Chart kind is not rendered by the dependency-free image exporter yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartTrendlineUnsupported
member.summary: Chart trendline rendering is not supported yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartDataLabelPointOverridesApproximated
member.summary: Point-level data-label overrides are approximated.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartDataLabelLeaderLinesUnsupported
member.summary: Data-label leader lines are not rendered yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAreaStyleApproximation
member.summary: Chart or plot area styling is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartGridlineStyleApproximation
member.summary: Chart gridline styling is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisStyleApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis styling is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisTickLabelPositionApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis tick-label placement is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisMinorTickMarkPlacementApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis minor tick-mark placement is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisCrossingApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis crossing behavior is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisScaleApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis scaling behavior is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartAxisNumberFormatApproximation
member.summary: Chart axis number formatting is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartSecondaryAxisUnsupported
member.summary: Chart secondary-axis series are rendered against the primary axis by the shared image renderer.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartCategoryAxisNumberFormatUnsupported
member.summary: Category/date-axis number formatting is not supported yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartTextStyleApproximation
member.summary: Chart text styling is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartFontFamilyFallback
member.summary: Requested chart text font family could not be loaded exactly by the dependency-free exporter.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ChartSeriesStyleApproximation
member.summary: Chart series styling is approximate.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PrintAreaMissing
member.summary: Print-area export was requested but the worksheet has no print area.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PrintAreaMultipleAreasUnsupported
member.summary: Multi-area print ranges are not supported by image export yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PrintAreaMultipleAreasSplit
member.summary: Multi-area print ranges were exported as separate worksheet images.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PrintAreaUnsupported
member.summary: Configured print area could not be used by image export.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ManualPageBreaksSplit
member.summary: Manual worksheet page breaks were used to split image export into separate results.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.ManualPageBreaksSingleImageUnsupported
member.summary: Manual worksheet page-break splitting was requested through a single-image export path.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PrintTitlesUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet print title rows or columns are not repeated in image page output yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PageSetupUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet page setup settings are not applied to image page geometry yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PageSetupPaperSizeDefaulted
member.summary: Worksheet page setup image output used the default paper size because no paper size is configured.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.PageSetupPaperSizeUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet page setup configured a paper size that image page geometry does not support yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.HeaderFooterUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet headers or footers are not rendered in image page output yet.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.HeaderFooterFormattingApproximation
member.summary: Worksheet header/footer text formatting is rendered through an approximate image-export path.

member.summary: Requested worksheet header/footer font family could not be loaded exactly by the dependency-free exporter.

member.summary: Worksheet header/footer image was rendered through an approximate image-export path.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportDiagnosticCodes.HeaderFooterImageUnsupported
member.summary: Worksheet header/footer image could not be rendered by the requested image export format.

member.summary: Sparkline kind is not rendered by the image exporter yet.

member.summary: Sparkline data range could not be resolved.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.SafeRepairDefinedNames
member.summary: When true, attempts to repair common defined-name issues (duplicates, out-of-range LocalSheetId, #REF!) before save.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.ValidateOpenXml
member.summary: When true, validates the saved package using OpenXmlValidator and throws on any errors.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.SafePreflight
member.summary: When true, performs a safety preflight on all worksheets before saving, removing empty containers (e.g., empty Hyperlinks/MergeCells), dropping orphaned drawing/header-footer references, and cleaning up invalid table references. This can prevent rare "Repaired Records" notices in Excel.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.DisableFastPackageWriter
member.summary: When true, disables direct fast package writers and always uses the standard save finalization path.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.EvaluateFormulasBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, evaluates supported formulas and writes cached values before this save. Unsupported formulas are preserved for Excel-compatible applications to calculate.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.ClearCachedFormulaResultsBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, removes cached formula results before this save. Ignored when is true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.MarkFormulasDirtyBeforeSave
member.summary: When true, marks formulas dirty before this save so Excel-compatible applications recalculate on open.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.ForceFullCalculationOnOpen
member.summary: When true, writes workbook calculation properties requesting a full recalculation on open.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.LossPolicy
member.summary: Controls saves of workbooks projected from legacy XLS files when known legacy-only content cannot be represented by the selected output format. The default blocks the save.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSaveOptions.None
member.summary: Returns an options instance with all features disabled.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet
member.summary: Helpers for worksheet cell comments (notes).
Represents a single worksheet within an .
Data operations: autofilter, sorting (values-only), find/replace, and validation. Kept small and focused; advanced formatting lives in dedicated files.
Header-based helpers for addressing cells and columns by header name.
Header-based style helpers.
Helpers for inserting images anchored to worksheet cells.
Page setup helpers for orientation and margins.
Represents an Excel worksheet.
Read convenience methods exposed directly on ExcelSheet to avoid separate reader usage.
Helpers for adding sparklines to worksheets.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.UpdateSheetDimension
member.summary: Updates the SheetDimension element to reflect the current used range. Helps avoid rare "dimension" repair messages in Excel when generating sheets programmatically.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.EnsureWorksheetElementOrder
member.summary: Ensures all worksheet elements are in the correct order according to OpenXML schema. This must be called before saving to prevent validation errors.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.ExecuteWithPolicy(System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionMode},System.Action,System.Action,System.Action,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Core execution helper that handles a compute/apply split with optional parallelization. Compute runs without locks; only the apply stage is serialized under a document-level lock.
member.remarks: Pattern guidance: - The delegate must not touch the OpenXML DOM or any shared mutable state. It should prepare immutable data structures for the apply stage. - The delegate runs once under a writer lock and may mutate the DOM. - Prefer coarse-grained apply operations (e.g., single Append with a buffer) to minimize DOM churn. - Use to provide a best-effort scale hint; it need not be exact.
member.param: A short operation name used for diagnostics and policy decisions.
Approximate number of items to process; used to decide parallel vs sequential. This does not have to be exact but should reflect relative workload.
Force a specific execution mode (Sequential/Parallel); null to use policy (Automatic).
Single-threaded path. Used either when policy decides sequential or when compute/apply are not provided.
Compute phase that is safe to run without locks and must not mutate the OpenXML DOM.
Apply phase that writes to the DOM. This runs once under a serialized lock.
Cancellation token for the compute phase.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.SetHeaderImage(OfficeIMO.Excel.HeaderFooterPosition,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Adds an image to the worksheet header at the given position. This will also ensure the header text contains the picture placeholder (&G) in the corresponding section. Subsequent calls replace any previously set header/footer images for this sheet.
member.param: Left, Center, or Right header section.
Image bytes.
e.g. image/png, image/jpeg. Defaults to image/png.
Optional width in points. If omitted, inferred from image size at 96 DPI.
Optional height in points. If omitted, inferred proportionally.

1-based column index.
Image bytes.
Content type, e.g. image/png or image/jpeg.
Width in pixels.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.AddImageFromUrlAt(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Downloads an image from URL (with timeout and size limits) and anchors it to the specified cell.
member.param: 1-based row index where the top edge of the image will be anchored.
1-based column index where the left edge of the image will be anchored.
Remote image URL to download. Requests timeout after 5 seconds and must be smaller than 2 MB.
Desired image width in pixels. Defaults to 96 px, converted to English Metric Units (EMUs) for OpenXML positioning.
Desired image height in pixels. Defaults to 32 px, converted to EMUs.
Optional horizontal offset in pixels from the cell's left boundary. Positive values move the image right; defaults to 0 px.
Optional vertical offset in pixels from the cell's top boundary. Positive values move the image down; defaults to 0 px.

member.summary: Downloads an image from URL and returns a wrapper for setting metadata and sizing. Returns null when the image cannot be fetched.

member.summary: Adds an image from disk anchored to a worksheet cell. When is provided, the image is sized from its original pixel dimensions.

Image file path.
Optional exact image width in pixels. Defaults to the image's original width when known.
Optional exact image height in pixels. Defaults to the image's original height when known.
Optional percentage of the original image dimensions, for example 20 for 20%.
Optional horizontal offset in pixels from the cell's left boundary.
Optional vertical offset in pixels from the cell's top boundary.
Optional drawing name used by Excel's selection pane.
Optional alternative text description for accessibility.
Optional alternative text title.
Whether Excel should keep the picture aspect ratio locked.
Clockwise image rotation in degrees.

Maps the cell text to a destination sheet name.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.SetHyperlinkSmart(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.example: // Given a summary table where column A contains sheet names, link each cell to its sheet sheet.LinkCellsToInternalSheets("A2:A51", text => text, targetA1: "A1", styled: true);
member.summary: Creates an external hyperlink using a smart display strategy: prefer , then an RFC label (e.g., "RFC 7208") when detected, otherwise the URL host.
member.param: 1-based row index.
1-based column index.
Target URL.
Optional preferred display text.
When true, applies hyperlink styling (blue + underline).

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.LinkByHeaderToInternalSheets(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Func{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Links a column identified by to internal sheets using each cell's text. Defaults to linking to a sheet with the same name as the cell text. When the header is missing the operation is skipped.
member.param: Header text of the column to process.
First data row (1-based). Defaults to 2 (skip header).
Last data row (inclusive). When <= 0, uses the bottom of the used range.
Maps cell text to a destination sheet name; defaults to identity.
Destination cell on the target sheet (default "A1").
Optional display selector; defaults to the cell text.
Apply hyperlink styling (blue + underline).

member.summary: Non-throwing variant of . Returns false when the header cannot be found or inputs are invalid.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.AddAutoFilter(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}})
member.summary: Adds an AutoFilter to the worksheet or table.
member.param: The cell range to apply the filter to.
Optional filter criteria to apply.
member.remarks: Smart conflict resolution: - If a table exists on the same range, the AutoFilter is added to the table instead of the worksheet - If a worksheet-level AutoFilter exists, it's removed before adding to the table - This ensures Excel won't complain about conflicting filters Order doesn't matter - whether you add Table then AutoFilter or AutoFilter then Table, the final result will be a table with AutoFilter enabled.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.AddTable(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,OfficeIMO.Excel.TableStyle)
member.summary: Adds an Excel table to the worksheet over the specified range.
member.param: Cell range (e.g. "A1:B3") defining the table area.
Indicates whether the first row is a header row.
Name of the table. If empty, a default name is used.
Table style to apply.
member.remarks: All cells within must exist. Missing cells are automatically created with empty values.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.
Thrown when is not in a valid format.
Thrown when the specified range overlaps with an existing table.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.GetTableRange(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the A1 range covered by a table on this worksheet.
member.param: Table name or display name.
member.returns: The table reference, or null when no matching table exists.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.AddTable(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,OfficeIMO.Excel.TableStyle,System.Boolean,OfficeIMO.Excel.TableNameValidationMode)
member.summary: Adds an Excel table to the worksheet over the specified range with optional AutoFilter and name validation behavior.
member.param: Cell range (e.g. "A1:B3") defining the table area.
Indicates whether the first row is a header row.

Name of the table. If empty, a default name is used. Examples: "My Table" becomes "My_Table"; "123Report" becomes "_123Report"; spaces and invalid characters are replaced with underscores. If a name already exists in this workbook, a numeric suffix is appended (e.g., "Table", "Table2").
Table style to apply.
Whether to include AutoFilter dropdowns in the table headers.
member.remarks: Smart AutoFilter handling: - If includeAutoFilter is true and a worksheet-level AutoFilter exists on the same range, it's moved to the table (preserving any filter criteria). - If includeAutoFilter is false and a worksheet-level AutoFilter exists, it's removed (Excel doesn't allow both worksheet AutoFilter and a table on the same range). - Order doesn't matter — the final state will be consistent regardless of operation order.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheet.EnsureValidUniqueTableName(System.String,OfficeIMO.Excel.TableNameValidationMode)
member.summary: Ensures a valid and unique table name according to OfficeIMO rules. Rules: - Allowed characters: letters, digits, underscore; spaces become underscores. - Names cannot start with a digit; an underscore is prefixed if necessary. - Names are scoped per workbook and checked case-insensitively. - When is , throws for invalid input. Examples: - "My Table" ⇒ "My_Table" - "Sales#2025" ⇒ "Sales_2025" - "123Report" ⇒ "_123Report" - If "Table" already exists, next becomes "Table2" ("Table3", ...)

member.summary: Options for merging worksheet data into another worksheet.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.SourceRange
member.summary: Source range to copy. When omitted, the source worksheet used range is copied.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.TargetStartRow
member.summary: 1-based target row. When omitted, rows are appended after the target worksheet used range.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.TargetStartColumn
member.summary: 1-based target column. When omitted, the source range's starting column is used.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.SourceHasHeader
member.summary: Indicates that the first source row is a header row.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.IncludeSourceHeader
member.summary: Copies the source header row. By default, headers are skipped when appending source rows.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.MatchColumnsByHeader
member.summary: Matches source columns to target columns by header text before copying values. Existing positional behavior is used when this is false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.TargetHeaderRow
member.summary: 1-based row containing target headers when is true. When omitted, append operations use the first row of the target used range, and explicit target positions use the row immediately above .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.BlankRowsBefore
member.summary: Blank rows to leave before appended data when is omitted.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetMergeOptions.OverwriteExistingCells
member.summary: Allows merge/join operations to overwrite existing target cell contents. When false, merge/join operations throw if a non-empty source cell would replace an existing target cell.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.WorksheetValidationMode
member.summary: Controls when worksheet mutations perform structural validation.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.WorksheetValidationMode.Disabled
member.summary: No validation is performed after write operations.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.WorksheetValidationMode.DiagnosticsOnly
member.summary: Run validation only when diagnostics are requested via callbacks or explicit opt-in.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.WorksheetValidationMode.DebugOnly
member.summary: Run lightweight validation in all builds and enable full Open XML validation in Debug builds only.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.WorksheetValidationMode.Always
member.summary: Always run structural validation regardless of diagnostics configuration.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy
member.summary: Controls how heavy operations in OfficeIMO.Excel run (sequential vs parallel) based on workload size. Configure global and per‑operation thresholds and optionally observe decisions.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.Mode
member.summary: Global execution mode. When , the policy selects sequential or parallel per operation.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.ParallelThreshold
member.summary: Default threshold above which Automatic switches to Parallel.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.OperationThresholds
member.summary: Per-operation thresholds (names: "CellValues", "InsertObjects", "AutoFitColumns", ...).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.MaxDegreeOfParallelism
member.summary: Optional cap for parallel compute phase.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.OnDecision
member.summary: Structured diagnostics (operation, items, decided mode).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.OnTiming
member.summary: Optional timing callback invoked by long-running operations to report elapsed time. Provides a lightweight hook for performance monitoring in large workbooks. Operation names may include whole operations such as "AutoFitColumns" and scoped sub-stages such as "AutoFitColumns.BuildPlan", "AutoFitColumns.CalculateWidths", or "AutoFitColumns.ApplyWidths".

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.OnInfo
member.summary: Optional informational callback for verbose/debug diagnostics (no sheet output). Use to observe non-fatal events (e.g., grid overflow handled by Shrink/Summarize).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.DiagnosticsRequested
member.summary: Indicates whether consumers explicitly requested diagnostics. When true, operations configured with will run validation even if no callbacks are wired.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.WorksheetValidation
member.summary: Controls when worksheet mutation validation is executed. Defaults to running only when diagnostics are requested to avoid penalizing hot paths.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.SaveWorksheetAfterAutoFit
member.summary: Saves the worksheet part immediately after AutoFit mutates row heights or column widths. Disable for large report-generation pipelines that call or dispose the document after a batch of worksheet mutations.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.UseOpenXmlValidatorInDebug
member.summary: Enables invoking while debugging. This incurs a significant cost and is ignored when not compiling in DEBUG mode.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.ReportTiming(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Helper to invoke the timing callback if configured.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.Decide(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decide execution mode for a given operation and workload size.
member.param: Descriptive operation name (e.g. "ReadRange", "AutoFitColumns").
Approximate number of items to process.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionPolicy.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a policy with recommended default thresholds for common operations.

member.param: Number of columns (2–4 recommended).
Callback that receives an array of ColumnComposer objects.
Width per column in grid columns (for relative positioning only).
Spacing between columns in grid columns.
Specifies how to handle content that exceeds the allocated width of a column.

member.summary: Whether worksheet charts should be included when supported.

member.summary: Whether supported conditional formatting visuals should be included.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportOptions.ConditionalFormattingDate
member.summary: Date used to evaluate relative conditional-formatting time-period rules such as Today, Yesterday, Last7Days, and ThisMonth. When omitted, image export uses the current local date captured during option normalization.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportOptions.ShowHyperlinkHints
member.summary: Whether cells with hyperlink metadata should get a default blue underline hint when their style does not already make the link visible.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportOptions.ShowCommentBodies
member.summary: Whether visible cell comment and threaded-comment bodies should be rendered as dependency-free callouts.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportOptions.DefaultColumnWidthPixels
member.summary: Default column width in pixels when a column has no explicit width.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelImageExportOptions.DefaultRowHeightPixels
member.summary: Default row height in pixels when a row has no explicit height.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetImageExportOptions
member.summary: Options for worksheet image export.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetImageExportOptions.Range
member.summary: Optional explicit range. When omitted, the worksheet used range is exported.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetImageExportOptions.HeaderFooterDateTime
member.summary: Timestamp used for dynamic Excel header/footer date and time fields such as &D, &T, &[Date], and &[Time]. When omitted, image export uses the current local time captured at the start of the worksheet export.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetImageExportOptions.UsePrintArea
member.summary: When true and is omitted, uses the worksheet print area when configured.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorksheetImageExportOptions.SplitByManualPageBreaks
member.summary: When true, splits output at manual row and column page breaks. Single-image worksheet export keeps one result and emits a diagnostic instead of splitting.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions
member.summary: Options for workbook image export.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions.SheetNames
member.summary: Optional list of worksheet names to export. When omitted, visible worksheets are exported.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions.IncludeHiddenSheets
member.summary: When true and is omitted, workbook image export includes hidden and very hidden worksheets. Explicitly named worksheets are exported regardless of visibility.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions.HeaderFooterDateTime
member.summary: Timestamp used for dynamic Excel header/footer date and time fields in worksheet image exports. When omitted, workbook image export uses the current local time captured at the start of the workbook export.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions.UseWorksheetPrintAreas
member.summary: When true, each worksheet image export uses that worksheet's print area when configured.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelWorkbookImageExportOptions.SplitWorksheetsByManualPageBreaks
member.summary: When true, workbook image export asks each worksheet to split output at manual row and column page breaks.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.LegacyXls.Diagnostics.LegacyXlsImportDiagnostic

Creates a diagnostic for a legacy XLS import issue or feature note.
member.param: Diagnostic severity.
Stable diagnostic code.
Human-readable diagnostic message.
Optional worksheet name associated with the diagnostic.
Optional byte offset of the related BIFF record.
Optional BIFF record type identifier.
Optional stable detail key for grouped import reports.
Optional formula source context associated with formula-token diagnostics.
Optional BIFF formula token byte associated with formula-token diagnostics.
Optional zero-based parsed-expression token offset associated with formula-token diagnostics.
Optional BIFF formula token name associated with formula-token diagnostics.

member.summary: Controls validation behavior for workbook defined names (Named Ranges) and A1 range bounds.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.NameValidationMode.Sanitize
member.summary: Adjust invalid input into a legal Excel defined name (replace invalid characters with underscore, ensure a valid starting character, trim length). Names that resemble A1/R1C1 cell addresses are prefixed with an underscore. Out-of-bounds A1 ranges are clamped to Excel limits.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.NameValidationMode.Strict
member.summary: Enforce Excel rules strictly: throws when the name is invalid or the A1 range exceeds Excel bounds.

member.summary: Reads a rectangular range and maps rows (excluding the header row) into instances of T. Header cells are matched to public writable properties on T by name (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheetReader.ReadObjectsStream``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.summary: Returns the used range of the worksheet as an A1 string (e.g., "A1:C10"). If the sheet is empty, returns "A1:A1".

member.summary: Creates a forward-only over a rectangular range without materializing the full range. The reader buffers at most data rows to infer column types, then continues from the worksheet stream.
member.param: A rectangular A1 range to read.
When true, the first row supplies column names.
Number of worksheet rows requested from each streaming chunk.
Maximum number of data rows buffered for schema inference.
Optional execution mode used by the range stream.
Cancellation token observed while streaming.
member.returns: A forward-only reader that must be disposed after use.

member.summary: Reads a rectangular range into a sequence of dictionaries using the first row as headers.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheetReader.ReadUsedRange(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the worksheet used range into a dense two-dimensional array of typed values. Table-backed worksheets are discovered and materialized in one worksheet pass.
member.param: Cancellation token observed while reading the worksheet.
member.returns: Typed matrix populated from the worksheet used range.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheetReader.ReadRows(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lazily reads each row within the A1 range as a typed object array. Values are converted using shared strings and styles (date detection).
member.param: Inclusive A1 range (e.g., "A1:C100").
Cancellation token.
member.returns: Sequence of rows as object?[] with fixed width equal to the range width. Rows without any cells yield null.
member.remarks: A null row is emitted when the worksheet row is missing from the requested range or when it contains no cells within the specified bounds. Consumers that require dense data can call which throws an when an empty worksheet row is encountered.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelSheetReader.ReadRangeStream(System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{OfficeIMO.Excel.ExecutionMode},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lazily reads a rectangular A1 range as ordered row chunks. DOM traversal is single-threaded; per-chunk value conversion is offloaded in parallel based on Execution policy.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions
member.summary: Reading options controlling conversion behavior and execution policy.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.Execution
member.summary: Execution policy used to decide Sequential vs Parallel conversion. Reuses the writer-side policy for symmetry.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.UseCachedFormulaResult
member.summary: Use cached formula results when present; otherwise returns the formula string.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.TreatDatesUsingNumberFormat
member.summary: Interpret numeric cells with a date-like number format as DateTime (OADate).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.Culture
member.summary: Culture used when parsing numbers and dates stored as strings.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.FillBlanksInRanges
member.summary: When true, matrix/range readers fill unspecified cells with nulls.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.NormalizeHeaders
member.summary: Normalize headers for object mapping by trimming and collapsing whitespace.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.NumericAsDecimal
member.summary: When true, numeric cells are returned as decimal where possible; otherwise double is used.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.InferDataTableColumnTypes
member.summary: When true, DataTable reads infer stable column types from the materialized range. Mixed-type columns stay object-typed.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.StrictTypedMapping
member.summary: When true, typed object readers throw if selected headers cannot be mapped deterministically to writable properties.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.CellValueConverter
member.summary: Optional cell-level converter hook. If provided and it returns a handled value, the built-in conversion pipeline is skipped and the returned value is used.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.TypeConverter
member.summary: Optional type conversion hook used by typed readers (ReadColumnAs/ReadRowsAs/ReadRangeAs and object mapping). If it returns ok=true, its value is used; otherwise the built-in converter is used.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.MaxSharedStringItems
member.summary: Maximum number of entries loaded from the workbook shared-string table. This protects readers from malformed workbooks that advertise or contain unbounded shared-string tables.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.MaxSharedStringItemCharacters
member.summary: Maximum character length for one shared-string item. The default matches Excel's worksheet cell text limit.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.MaxSharedStringCharacters
member.summary: Maximum aggregate characters loaded from the shared-string table.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes reading defaults and per-operation thresholds.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1
member.summary: Utility helpers for parsing and converting Excel A1 references. Public so examples and consumers can reuse consistent logic without re-implementing regexes or math.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.MaxRows
member.summary: Maximum row index supported by the Excel worksheet grid.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.MaxColumns
member.summary: Maximum column index supported by the Excel worksheet grid.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.ParseCellRef(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a single A1 cell reference (e.g., "B5") into a 1-based (row, column) tuple. Returns (0,0) when the input does not match a valid simple cell reference.
member.param: A1 cell reference, without sheet prefix.
member.returns: Tuple of row and column (1-based). Returns (0,0) if invalid.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.TryParseRange(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Tries to parse an A1 range (e.g., "A1:B10") into 1-based, normalized bounds. Returns false when the input is not a valid A1 range.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.ParseRange(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an A1 range (e.g., "A1:B10") into 1-based, normalized bounds. If the bounds are inverted, they are swapped so that r1 <= r2 and c1 <= c2.
member.param: A1 range string, without sheet prefix.
member.returns: (r1, c1, r2, c2) 1-based coordinates.
member.exception: Thrown when the input is not a valid A1 range.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.ColumnLettersToIndex(System.String)
member.summary: Converts column letters (e.g., "A", "AA") to a 1-based column index. Non-letter characters are ignored; returns 0 for empty/invalid input.
member.param: Excel column letters.
member.returns: 1-based column index, or 0 when input yields no letters.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.ColumnIndexToLetters(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a 1-based column index to Excel column letters (e.g., 1→"A", 27→"AA").
member.param: 1-based column index.
member.returns: Excel column letters; returns "A" for non-positive inputs.
member.example: string col = A1.ColumnIndexToLetters(28); // "AB" int idx = A1.ColumnLettersToIndex("AB"); // 28

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.A1.CellReference(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds an A1 cell reference from 1-based row and column indexes.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets
member.summary: Convenience presets for common read conversions to keep user code minimal. Provides several choices from minimal to more aggressive conversions.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets.None
member.summary: No extra converters. Equivalent to default ExcelReadOptions with only built-in behavior.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets.Simple
member.summary: Minimal, non-intrusive converters: - Y/Yes/N/No to bool - Currency-like strings to decimal (tries CurrentCulture, InvariantCulture, a few common locales)

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets.DecimalFirst
member.summary: Like Simple() but prefers decimal for numeric cells when possible.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets.ApplyBasicConverters(OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadOptions)
member.summary: Applies the same converters as returned by to an existing options instance.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelReadPresets.Aggressive
member.summary: Aggressive converters for convenience: - Extended bool: true/false/1/0/on/off/y/n/yes/no - Percent strings (e.g., 12%) to decimals (0.12) - Currency and plain numeric strings to decimal/double/int where appropriate - ISO date strings to DateTime

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.SharedStringPlanner
member.summary: Planner for SharedStrings to avoid DOM mutations during parallel compute. Collects distinct strings concurrently, applies them under document lock, and fixes up prepared cell values to reference shared string indices.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.SharedStringPlanner.ApplyTo(System.ValueTuple{System.Int32,System.Int32,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValue,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.EnumValue{DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValues}}[],OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument)
member.summary: Apply collected strings to the document's SharedStringTable and build final index mapping. Must be called inside a serialized apply stage (under document write lock).

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.SharedStringPlanner.Fixup(System.ValueTuple{System.Int32,System.Int32,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValue,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.EnumValue{DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValues}}@)
member.summary: Fixes a prepared cell tuple in-place, replacing SharedString text with its index.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.SharedStringPlanner.ApplyAndFixup(System.ValueTuple{System.Int32,System.Int32,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValue,DocumentFormat.OpenXml.EnumValue{DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.CellValues}}[],OfficeIMO.Excel.ExcelDocument)
member.summary: Applies planner to document and fixes all prepared cells. Must be called inside serialized apply stage.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.SheetNameValidationMode
member.summary: Controls how worksheet names are validated when adding sheets.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.SheetNameValidationMode.None
member.summary: Do not alter the provided name. The caller is responsible for ensuring it obeys Excel rules.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.SheetNameValidationMode.Sanitize
member.summary: Coerce the provided name into a valid Excel worksheet name by applying the rules: - Replace invalid characters (: \ / ? * [ ]) with underscore. - Trim leading/trailing apostrophes and whitespace. - Truncate to 31 characters. - Ensure non-empty; fall back to "Sheet". - Ensure uniqueness across the workbook by appending " (2)", " (3)", etc.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.SheetNameValidationMode.Strict
member.summary: Enforce Excel rules strictly; throw if the name is empty, too long (> 31), contains invalid characters (: \ / ? * [ ]), or would collide (case-insensitive) with an existing sheet.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.StylePlanner
member.summary: Minimal planner for number formats/styles. Collects distinct number format strings during compute, then creates NumberingFormats and CellFormats once in the apply stage.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.TableNameValidationMode
member.summary: Controls how AddTable validates the provided table name.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.TableNameValidationMode.Sanitize
member.summary: Replace invalid characters, normalize, and ensure uniqueness.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Excel.TableNameValidationMode.Strict
member.summary: Throw descriptive exceptions when the name doesn't meet requirements.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions
member.summary: Configuration for flattening objects into key/value pairs where keys represent dotted paths.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.ExpandProperties
member.summary: Property names or dotted paths to expand (descend into) rather than treat as simple values.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.IncludeFullObjects
member.summary: When true, includes the original object under its path in addition to expanded fields.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum recursion depth when expanding nested objects.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.HeaderCase
member.summary: Header casing strategy for generated column names.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.HeaderPrefixTrimPaths
member.summary: Optional prefixes to trim from generated headers.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Columns
member.summary: Optional explicit column whitelist (dotted paths).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Ignore
member.summary: Paths to exclude from output.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.IncludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience include list using property names or dotted paths. When specified, only matching columns are kept. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment (property name) matches case-insensitively. This is a friendlier alias for .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.ExcludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience exclude list using property names or dotted paths. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment (property name) matches case-insensitively. This augments which treats values as dotted-path prefixes.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinnedFirst
member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the front of the generated column order when is not specified. Matching paths keep the specified order; any non-matching paths follow in natural order.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinnedLast
member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the end of the generated column order. Processed after .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PropertyPriority
member.summary: Optional per-column priority ordering. Lower numbers appear earlier. Keys can be dotted paths or property names. When not specified, relative discovery order is preserved. Applied after and before .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.NullPolicy
member.summary: How null values are represented.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.DefaultValues
member.summary: Per‑path default values used when is selected.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Formatters
member.summary: Per‑path formatting delegates applied to values.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionMode
member.summary: How to handle collections.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionJoinWith
member.summary: Delimiter used when is selected.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionMapColumns
member.summary: Maps collection paths (e.g., "ScoreBreakdown") to dynamic columns using element properties. Example: map path "ScoreBreakdown" with KeyProperty="Name", ValueProperty="Value" to produce columns like "ScoreBreakdown.HasMX" = 2, "ScoreBreakdown.EffectiveSPFSends" = 2.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinFirst(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds or appends to while preserving order and uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinLast(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds or appends to while preserving order and uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PriorityOrder(System.String[])
member.summary: Sets priority order 1..N for the provided paths (full path or property name).

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Include(System.String[])
member.summary: Appends to while preserving uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Exclude(System.String[])
member.summary: Appends to while preserving uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Excel.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Order(System.String[],System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: One-call convenience: set pin-first, priority order, and pin-last. Any argument may be null; order is applied as PinFirst → PriorityOrder → PinLast.
